title: Common 2-word phrases sprint
description: Frequent word pairs — train them as units
text: of the in the to the for the on the at the with the from the by the as the and the but the so the if the when the where the after the before the about the

tips.text: 'of the', 'in the', 'to the' = ~10% of all 2-word phrases
Type the whole phrase without pausing between words

tips.target: of the in the to the for the on the at the with the from the by the as

tips.text: If you can do 'the' in under 0.3s, you're at pro level

tips.target: the and the but the so the if the when the where the after the before the about the

character_tips.anna: Phrase-level chunking is where 60+ WPM lives. Words become groups.
character_tips.knopych: Phrase combos! 🔗 Words linked into chains!
character_tips.klavochka: Like singing in lines, my love 🎶
